meta.name: PWI Personal Wellbeing Index
meta.description: The PWI is a 7-item scale that measures subjective wellbeing across seven quality of life domains. Each item corresponds to a life domain and is rated on an 11-point scale from 0 (completely dissatisfied) to 10 (completely satisfied).
meta.author: International Wellbeing Group (2013)
meta.reference: International Wellbeing Group. Personal Wellbeing Index. 5th Edition. Melbourne: Australian Centre on Quality of Life, Deakin University; 2013.
meta.instruction: The following questions ask how satisfied you feel, on a scale from 0 to 10, about different aspects of your life.

questions.text: How satisfied are you with your standard of living?
How satisfied are you with your health?
How satisfied are you with what you are achieving in life?
How satisfied are you with your personal relationships?
How satisfied are you with how safe you feel?
How satisfied are you with feeling part of your community?
How satisfied are you with your future security?

ranges.label: Very Low Wellbeing
ranges.description: Your personal wellbeing score is very low, indicating significant dissatisfaction across multiple life domains. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Consider seeking professional support from a counselor or psychologist
Identify the life domains causing the most dissatisfaction
Focus on basic self-care: adequate sleep, nutrition, and physical activity
Set small, achievable goals to build a sense of progress
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness

ranges.label: Low Wellbeing
ranges.description: Your personal wellbeing score is below average. You may be experiencing dissatisfaction in several important life areas. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Reflect on which life domains need the most attention
Develop an action plan to address areas of dissatisfaction
Strengthen social connections and seek support
Engage in activities that bring you joy and meaning
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle

ranges.label: Moderate Wellbeing
ranges.description: Your personal wellbeing is at a moderate level. You experience reasonable satisfaction in most areas. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Continue nurturing the areas where you feel most satisfied
Identify specific domains for improvement and set goals
Maintain regular social engagement and community involvement
Practice gratitude and focus on positive aspects of your life
Increase the frequency of positive social activities

ranges.label: High Wellbeing
ranges.description: Your personal wellbeing score is high, indicating strong satisfaction across most life domains. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Continue maintaining the habits and relationships that support your wellbeing
Share your positive experiences and strategies with others
Stay engaged with your community and personal goals
Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
